Petition For Order Compelling Trustee, W. M. Mcleod To Account
Off Calendar Aug-25-2015 Continued To Oct-20-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Mayo for (petitioner/beneficiary) Elizabeth McLeod. Michael Dobrov for (trustee) William McLeod.

The Court stated that the parties are ready for mediation, confirmed that they qualify for pro bono mediation and asked for dates. Ms. Mayo reported that the parties have agreed to use Stella Pantazis, that they have sent an email to her with a list of dates and are waiting for a response. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than October 9, 2015. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 17, 2015. The petition for order compelling trustee to account was continued to and the Parties are to return on October 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
